## Summary

<!-- What does this PR change, and why? -->

## Related issue

<!-- e.g. Closes #123 -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature / enhancement
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Build / CI / chore

## Checklist

- [ ] `./gradlew build` passes locally (full offline suite)
- [ ] Added/updated tests for the change (a regression test for bug fixes)
- [ ] No new runtime dependency added to the main `implementation` config (client-java + slf4j-api
      only; no logging backend)
- [ ] Reporting stays non-fatal (failures are guarded, logged, and swallowed)
- [ ] Updated the README / docs if user-facing behavior changed
